diff: This document defines the action that should be performed if there is a need to repay and then burn Pattern's USDS debt. The operator must call the `burnUSDS` function.
The function call is as follows:
More detailed instructions on the code to execute this, see [A.6.1.1.6.2.6.1.2.2.1.2.1.2.1.2 - Burn USDS](886d04ba-23c3-45fb-ac5d-044288a621e1).
